Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I gave it my all working part-time[n]at the concession stand...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Someone asked for a recommendation,[n]so I picked a movie that fit their taste...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}In my spare time, I read brochures[n]and learned about trending movies...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}While working, I made eye contact[n]with zombies on the movie posters...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There was a complaint about noisy[n]customers, so I gave them a warning...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I confidently recommended popcorn to[n]a customer, and they bought some...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I really appreciate your help. I'll be raising your hourly rate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I'm getting the hang of things,[n]they're giving me a slight raise...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You're really getting good at this! I'm looking forward to seeing you continue to improve![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I've gotten better at my work,[n]they're giving me a slight raise...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I've improved my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]and {f 4 30 2 1 1 0} because of work...[n]{f 1 1}
